description: Downloads a file from a URL
author: Joshua Gould
plan:
## DownloadURL GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
DownloadURL is a GenePattern module that Downloads a file from a URL

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 2 parameters:
- Required: URL, output.file
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>download.jar DownloadFile <URL> <output.file>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: URL
parameters.description: The URL to retrieve the file from

parameters.name: output.file
parameters.description: The name of the output file
